articles.title: Here’s the Celtics’ 2026 Summer League roster and schedule
articles.description:
Hugo Gonzalez headlines Boston's roster, which also features first-round pick Chris Cenac Jr.

The post Here’s the Celtics’ 2026 Summer League roster and schedule appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics' 2026 Summer League roster includes first-round pick Chris Cenac Jr.
Hugo Gonzalez leads the roster, showcasing local talent for Boston fans.
Summer League games provide Boston residents a chance to see future stars.

articles.title: Tartan Army makes a big donation to help Mass. students in need
articles.description:
“The Tartan Army showed the world what it means to care for one another, to support one another, and to celebrate together.”

The post Tartan Army makes a big donation to help Mass. students in need appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Tartan Army donated significant funds to support Massachusetts students in need.
The donation aims to assist thousands of students facing financial challenges.
Local schools will benefit from increased resources and support for students.

articles.title: A Vermont prosecutor’s dog keeps biting people. Critics say the woman’s behaving like she’s above the law.
articles.description:
BURLINGTON, Vt. — By most accounts, Moose has been a very bad boy. In recent years, the 65-pound brindle mix has repeatedly attacked other dogs, adults, and even a child. But it’s the behavior of Moose’s owner, Diane Wheeler, that has her neighbors, city officials, and members of Vermont’s legal community yapping. They allege that […]

The post A Vermont prosecutor’s dog keeps biting people. Critics say the woman’s behaving like she’s above the law. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Moose, a 65-pound dog, has attacked multiple people and pets in Burlington, Vermont.
Owner Diane Wheeler faces criticism for allegedly ignoring the dog's aggressive behavior.
Local residents express concern over safety and demand accountability from Wheeler and authorities.

articles.title: Your neighborhood Cumbies could soon look a little different
articles.description:
Cumberland Farms' parent company filed to go public and says it plans to renovate stores and expand the chain.

The post Your neighborhood Cumbies could soon look a little different appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Cumberland Farms plans to renovate and expand its stores across Boston neighborhoods.
The parent company filed to go public, indicating significant growth potential.
Local residents may see updated facilities and improved services in their communities.
